title: tenaxia stricta
intro: Tenaxia stricta, also known as Wild Rue or Prickly Chokeberry, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tenaxia stricta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestive health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Tenaxia stricta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
